tool_calls:
set -euo pipefail
jq -n \
  --argfile defaults /config/defaults.json \
  --argfile production /config/production.json \
  '
  def deepmerge($a; $b):
    if ($a|type) == "object" and ($b|type) == "object" then
      reduce ((($a|keys_unsorted) + ($b|keys_unsorted) | unique[])) as $k
        ({};
         .[$k] = if ($a|has($k)) and ($b|has($k)) then deepmerge($a[$k]; $b[$k])
                 elif ($b|has($k)) then $b[$k]
                 else $a[$k]
                 end)
    else
      $b
    end;
  deepmerge($defaults; $production)
  ' | tee /config/merged.json

jq --version; ls -l /config; jq -n --argfile defaults /config/defaults.json --argfile production /config/production.json 'def deepmerge($a; $b): if ($a|type)=="object" and ($b|type)=="object" then reduce ((($a|keys_unsorted)+($b|keys_unsorted)|unique[])) as $k ({}; .[$k] = if ($a|has($k)) and ($b|has($k)) then deepmerge($a[$k]; $b[$k]) elif ($b|has($k)) then $b[$k] else $a[$k] end) else $b end; deepmerge($defaults; $production)'

set -euo pipefail
jq -s '
  def deepmerge($a; $b):
    if ($a|type) == "object" and ($b|type) == "object" then
      reduce ((($a|keys_unsorted) + ($b|keys_unsorted) | unique[])) as $k
        ({};
         .[$k] = if ($a|has($k)) and ($b|has($k)) then deepmerge($a[$k]; $b[$k])
                 elif ($b|has($k)) then $b[$k]
                 else $a[$k]
                 end)
    else
      $b
    end;
  deepmerge(.[0]; .[1])
' /config/defaults.json /config/production.json | tee /config/merged.json

Use jq --help for help with command-line options.
